# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

This modernization run upgrades the Blazor project to .NET 10 and then performs the requested follow-up modernization items in sequence. Work will proceed automatically unless a blocking issue is encountered.

**Progress**: 4/4 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-dotnet10-upgrade: Upgrade project to .NET 10
- ✅ 02-sdk-style-validation: Validate SDK-style project format
- ✅ 03-json-modernization: Migrate Newtonsoft.Json usage to System.Text.Json
- ✅ 04-sqlclient-modernization: Migrate System.Data.SqlClient to Microsoft.Data.SqlClient
